title: lappula rigida
intro: Lappula rigida, also known as the stiff lappula or stickseed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and is also used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. Lappula rigida can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or ointment, and is often used in traditional medicine to address various health concerns.
